description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a distinctive black and red color scheme, featuring four forward-swept wings arranged in an X-formation. The wings are equipped with mounted weaponry or sensor pods at their tips, and the fuselage is angular with a pointed nose and a compact, streamlined canopy. Two large cylindrical jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanking the central fuselage, and the tail section is minimal, with no prominent vertical stabilizer visible. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with subtle red accents along the wings and body. The overall design suggests a high-performance, combat-oriented aircraft, reminiscent of science fiction or advanced military technology.
description: A black and red, X-wing style airplane with four swept wings, rear-mounted twin jet engines, and a streamlined, angular fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the X-shaped wing configuration, pointed nose, and twin rear engines.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, weapon pods at wing tips, and the angular fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two large jet exhausts and the minimal tail section.
description_view_3: Bottom view emphasizing the undercarriage, engine mounts, and the symmetry of the wing and fuselage layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, forward-swept X-configuration with four wings, each equipped with wingtip pods; no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail with no prominent vertical stabilizer; unconventional configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy integrated into the fuselage.
